description: Extracts one part from a sliced solid. Part 0 = negative side, Part 1 = positive side of the cutting plane.
utility: Extract a part from a cross-sectioned solid

arguments.name: part
arguments.description: Part to extract: part(0) = negative side, part(1) = positive side

examples.scenario: Extract positive side of sliced cube
examples.expression:
S = cube3d(at(4,4), view(14,14), 3)
slice_1 = slice3d(at(4,22), S, crossplane(y, 0.5))
extract_1 = extractsolid3d(at(4,40), slice_1, part(1), view(14,14))
extract_0 = extractsolid3d(at(20,40), slice_1, part(0), view(14,14), c(red))
